features.name: negative array index access in function
features.description: Code should include a function with an array accessed using a negative index expression where the loop counter becomes negative

features.name: constant function evaluation with array access
features.description: Code should include a function that accesses an array being called as a constant expression in a localparam declaration

features.name: for loop array access out of bounds
features.description: Code should include a for loop that iterates beyond array bounds while accessing array elements
